content:
# elizaos/elizaos.github.io Daily Update (Apr 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on infrastructure updates, specifically integrating the `elizaos/cloud` repository into the pipeline configuration to ensure comprehensive contributor tracking.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Pipeline Configuration Updates**
* Added `elizaos/cloud` (default branch: `dev`) to `PIPELINE_REPOS` to enable automated ingestion and leaderboard tracking for the repository ([#243](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/pull/243)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* None.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Feature and Integration Proposals**
* [#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/issues/6977): Proposal regarding Agent Commerce and Merxex integration.
* [#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/elizaos.github.io/issues/7007): Feature request for a PII sanitization layer prior to LLM processing.

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
